title: Greenhouse Pod Dispersion: No Three Sensors in a Row
strategies: quadratic-residue baseline: place pod i at (i/n, (i^2 mod n)/n); reproduces the checker baseline (~0.1) and has all triangles non-degenerate

randomized local search: from a seeded random layout, repeatedly relocate one vertex of the current smallest-area triangle to a spot that does not shrink the minimum triangle area (single restart, few iterations)
multi-restart adaptive local search: many seeded restarts with an annealed move radius, always improving the worst (smallest-area) triangle, keeping the best layout found
structured spreading / boundary-aware placements that keep every triple far from collinear
